hero.title: Crafting Digital Excellence
hero.subtitle: We are Sharx a London-based software company delivering cutting-edge mobile solutions to clients worldwide

about.lead: We are a group of people with a common dream, to make this world better for everyone.
about.story: A strong friendship led to the creation of Sharx. Based in London, we collaborate with talented professionals from around the world, bringing diverse perspectives and cutting-edge expertise to every project.
about.missionText: To help people ameliorate their daily life by delivering software solutions to the people who need them.
about.valueRespect: We treat everyone with respect and empathy.
about.valueIntegrity: We always act with honesty and transparency.
about.valueExcellence: We are dedicated to delivering high-quality solutions.

products.sectionSubtitle: Innovative solutions designed to solve real-world problems
products.sharxDesc: Revolutionary carpooling platform that connects commuters heading in the same direction. Save money, reduce carbon footprint, and make your daily commute more enjoyable by sharing rides with verified users.
products.rotaiqDesc: Intelligent scheduling software that automates workforce management. Create optimal work schedules in minutes, considering availability, skills, and labor regulations. Perfect for businesses of all sizes.

services.sectionSubtitle: Comprehensive software solutions tailored to your needs
services.mobileDesc: Cross-platform mobile applications built with the latest technologies. From iOS to Android, we create seamless experiences for your users.
services.webDesc: Modern, responsive web applications that deliver exceptional user experiences. Built with cutting-edge frameworks and best practices.
services.cloudDesc: Scalable cloud infrastructure and deployment strategies. We help you leverage the power of AWS, Azure, and Google Cloud.
services.uiuxDesc: Beautiful, intuitive interfaces that users love. Our design team creates experiences that are both functional and delightful.
services.consultingDesc: Expert guidance on technology decisions and digital transformation. We help you navigate the complex world of software development.
services.productDesc: End-to-end product development from concept to launch. We turn your ideas into reality with agile methodologies.

sharxProduct.heroDescription: Revolutionary carpooling platform connecting commuters for shared rides. Save money, reduce emissions, and make your commute enjoyable. Share the ride, Split the fare, Save money
sharxProduct.problemHeading: The Problem we are trying to solve…
sharxProduct.problemText1: Nowadays the expensive and environmentally harmful transportation is not a viable solution anymore
sharxProduct.problemText2: There is an increasing demand for taxi/ridehail rides that leads companies to expand their fleet.
sharxProduct.howItWorksIntro: We match co-riders so they can split their taxi fares.
sharxProduct.step1Desc: Select your departure and arrival point as well as your trip time.
sharxProduct.step2Desc: Scroll through the available co-riders and send ride-requests to those you like.
sharxProduct.step3Desc: Chat with your co-rider to build trust and organise an amazing taxi ride.
sharxProduct.pricingSubtitle: We offer a plan for everyone out there
sharxProduct.faqsSubtitle: Here you will find everything needed to start
sharxProduct.faq0Question: Where can I find the app?
sharxProduct.faq0Answer: The app is available for both iOS and Android devices. You can find it in App Store and Google Play. We work hard to offer to everyone safe, affordable and quick commuting.
sharxProduct.faq1Question: How will I find my co-rider?
sharxProduct.faq1Answer: After creating a free account in sharx app, you will be able to search for co-riders, send and receive ride requests and chat with them to plan your trip. Our app will help you find someone who is in close distance to you.
sharxProduct.faq2Question: Is it safe to use sharx?
sharxProduct.faq2Answer: Sharx creates a safe environment for all its users. We have implemented features such as rating and reporting to keep unwanted behaviours away. We respect all our users and we act quickly to eliminate any issue.
sharxProduct.faq3Question: Should I give money to book a ride?
sharxProduct.faq3Answer: You should NEVER send money to people you do not know. Currently, Sharx does not support direct taxi/ridehail from third parties. Therefore, it is better to meet with your co-rider and arrange the payment together.
sharxProduct.faq4Question: How do I buy more requests?
sharxProduct.faq4Answer: More requests means more possibilities to find a co-rider and share your ride. You can buy requests from the app's slide bar by selecting Purchase Requests.
sharxProduct.ctaDesc: Join commuters who are saving money and helping the environment. Download Sharx now!

rotaiqProduct.heroDescription: Intelligent workforce scheduling powered by AI. Automate shift planning, optimize staffing, and ensure compliance with labor regulations.
rotaiqProduct.featuresSubtitle: Everything you need for efficient workforce management
rotaiqProduct.feature1Desc: Advanced algorithms create optimal schedules considering availability, skills, preferences, and business requirements.
rotaiqProduct.feature2Desc: Reduce labor costs by up to 30% with intelligent staffing that matches demand perfectly without overstaffing.
rotaiqProduct.feature3Desc: Automatically ensure compliance with labor laws, union rules, and company policies. Avoid costly violations.
rotaiqProduct.feature4Desc: Employees can view schedules, request time off, and swap shifts from any device, anywhere, anytime.
rotaiqProduct.feature5Desc: Seamlessly integrates with existing payroll, HR, and time tracking systems. Quick setup with no disruption.
rotaiqProduct.feature6Desc: Instant notifications for schedule changes. Automatic conflict detection and resolution suggestions.
rotaiqProduct.benefit1Desc: Create schedules in minutes instead of hours. Reduce administrative time by 90% with automated scheduling.
rotaiqProduct.benefit2Desc: Optimize labor costs with AI-driven staffing. Eliminate overstaffing and reduce overtime expenses significantly.
rotaiqProduct.benefit3Desc: Employees get fair schedules that consider their preferences. Higher satisfaction leads to better retention.
rotaiqProduct.benefit4Desc: Stay compliant with all labor regulations automatically. Avoid fines and legal issues with built-in compliance checks.
rotaiqProduct.useCase1Desc: Handle variable customer traffic with flexible scheduling that adapts to peak hours and seasons.
rotaiqProduct.useCase2Desc: Ensure 24/7 coverage with shift rotations that meet medical staffing requirements and certifications.
rotaiqProduct.useCase3Desc: Manage diverse staff across multiple locations with schedules that account for events and bookings.
rotaiqProduct.useCase4Desc: Coordinate shift workers and production schedules with precision for maximum efficiency.
rotaiqProduct.ctaDesc: Join businesses saving time and money with intelligent workforce management. Download RotaIQ now!
